```{r, include=FALSE}
cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_secreted <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_secreted)

cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_secreted <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_secreted, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ECM <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ECM)

cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ECM <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ECM, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_nps <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_nps)
cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_nps <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_nps)
cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_nps <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_nps)
cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_nps <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_nps, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ccc <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ccc)
cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ccc <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ccc)
cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ccc <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ccc)
cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ccc <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ccc, slot.name = "netP")

# Pryce_scKPP_CTL
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_all <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_all)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_all <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_all)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_all <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_all)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_all <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_all, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_secreted <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_secreted)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_secreted <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_secreted)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_secreted <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_secreted)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_secreted <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_secreted, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ECM <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ECM)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ECM <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ECM)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ECM <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ECM)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ECM <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ECM, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_nps <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_nps)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_nps <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_nps)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_nps <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_nps)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_nps <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_nps, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ccc <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ccc)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ccc <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ccc)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ccc <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ccc)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ccc <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ccc, slot.name = "netP")

# Pryce_scKPP_KPP
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_all <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_all)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_all <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_all)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_all <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_all)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_all <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_all, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_secreted <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_secreted)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_secreted <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_secreted)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_secreted <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_secreted)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_secreted <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_secreted, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ECM <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ECM)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ECM <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ECM)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ECM <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ECM)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ECM <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ECM, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_nps <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_nps)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_nps <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_nps)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_nps <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_nps)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_nps <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_nps, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ccc <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ccc)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ccc <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ccc)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ccc <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ccc)
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ccc <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ccc, slot.name = "netP")

# Zhang_snKIC_CTL
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_all <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_all)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_all <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_all)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_all <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_all)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_all <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_all, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_secreted <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_secreted)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_secreted <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_secreted)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_secreted <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_secreted)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_secreted <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_secreted, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ECM <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ECM)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ECM <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ECM)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ECM <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ECM)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ECM <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ECM, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_nps <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_nps)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_nps <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_nps)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_nps <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_nps)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_nps <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_nps, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ccc <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ccc)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ccc <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ccc)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ccc <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ccc)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ccc <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ccc, slot.name = "netP")

# Zhang_snKIC_KIC
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_all <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_all)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_all <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_all)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_all <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_all)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_all <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_all, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_secreted <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_secreted)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_secreted <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_secreted)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_secreted <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_secreted)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_secreted <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_secreted, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ECM <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ECM)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ECM <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ECM)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ECM <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ECM)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ECM <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ECM, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_nps <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_nps)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_nps <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_nps)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_nps <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_nps)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_nps <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_nps, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ccc <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ccc)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ccc <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ccc)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ccc <- aggregateNet(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ccc)
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ccc <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ccc, slot.name = "netP")
```



# Remove unused objects from the environment

```{r}
rm(Agca_snLLC_CTL, Agca_snLLC_LLC, Brown_scLLC_CTL, Brown_scLLC_2w, Brown_scLLC_2.5w, Brown_scLLC_3.5w, Kim_scB16F10_CTL, Kim_scB16F10_B16F10, Pryce_scC26_CTL, Pryce_scC26_C26, Pryce_scKPP_CTL, Pryce_scKPP_KPP, Zhang_snKIC_CTL, Zhang_snKIC_KIC, samples_Agca_snLLC_CTL, data_input_Agca_snLLC_CTL, data_input_Agca_snLLC_LLC, data_input_Brown_scLLC_CTL, data_input_Brown_scLLC_2w, data_input_Brown_scLLC_2.5w, data_input_Brown_scLLC_3.5w, data_input_Kim_scB16F10_CTL, data_input_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10, data_input_Pryce_scC26_CTL, data_input_Pryce_scC26_C26, data_input_Pryce_scKPP_CTL, data_input_Pryce_scKPP_KPP, data_input_Zhang_snKIC_CTL, data_input_Zhang_snKIC_KIC, samples_Agca_snLLC_LLC, samples_Brown_scLLC_CTL, samples_Brown_scLLC_2w, samples_Brown_scLLC_2.5w, samples_Brown_scLLC_3.5w, samples_Kim_scB16F10_CTL, samples_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10, samples_Pryce_scC26_CTL, samples_Pryce_scC26_C26, samples_Pryce_scKPP_CTL, samples_Pryce_scKPP_KPP, samples_Zhang_snKIC_CTL, samples_Zhang_snKIC_KIC, labels_Agca_snLLC_CTL, labels_Agca_snLLC_LLC, labels_Brown_scLLC_CTL, labels_Brown_scLLC_2w, labels_Brown_scLLC_2.5w, labels_Brown_scLLC_3.5w, labels_Kim_scB16F10_CTL, labels_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10, labels_Pryce_scC26_CTL, labels_Pryce_scC26_C26, labels_Pryce_scKPP_CTL, labels_Pryce_scKPP_KPP, labels_Zhang_snKIC_CTL, labels_Zhang_snKIC_KIC, CellChatDB_ccc, CellChatDB_ECM, CellChatDB_nps, CellChatDB_secreted, cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_meta, cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_meta, cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_meta, cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_meta, cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_meta, cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_meta, cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_meta, cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_meta, cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_meta, cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_meta, cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_meta, cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_meta, cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_meta, cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_meta)

rm(enrichedLR_Agca_snLLC_CTL_all, enrichedLR_Agca_snLLC_CTL_secreted, enrichedLR_Agca_snLLC_CTL_ECM, enrichedLR_Agca_snLLC_CTL_ccc, enrichedLR_Agca_snLLC_CTL_nps, enrichedLR_Agca_snLLC_LLC_all, enrichedLR_Agca_snLLC_LLC_secreted, enrichedLR_Agca_snLLC_LLC_ECM, enrichedLR_Agca_snLLC_LLC_ccc, enrichedLR_Agca_snLLC_LLC_nps, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_CTL_all, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_CTL_secreted, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_CTL_ECM, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_CTL_ccc, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_CTL_nps, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_2w_all, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_2w_secreted, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_2w_ECM, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_2w_ccc, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_2w_nps, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_all, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_secreted, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_ECM, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_ccc, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_nps, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_all, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_secreted, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_ECM, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_ccc, enrichedLR_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_nps, enrichedLR_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_all, enrichedLR_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_secreted, enrichedLR_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_ECM, enrichedLR_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_ccc, enrichedLR_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_nps, enrichedLR_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_all, enrichedLR_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_secreted, enrichedLR_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_ECM, enrichedLR_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_ccc, enrichedLR_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_nps, enrichedLR_Pryce_scC26_CTL_all, enrichedLR_Pryce_scC26_CTL_secreted, enrichedLR_Pryce_scC26_CTL_ECM, enrichedLR_Pryce_scC26_CTL_ccc, enrichedLR_Pryce_scC26_CTL_nps, enrichedLR_Pryce_scC26_C26_all, enrichedLR_Pryce_scC26_C26_secreted, enrichedLR_Pryce_scC26_C26_ECM, enrichedLR_Pryce_scC26_C26_ccc, enrichedLR_Pryce_scC26_C26_nps, enrichedLR_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_all, enrichedLR_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_secreted, enrichedLR_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ECM, enrichedLR_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ccc, enrichedLR_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_nps, enrichedLR_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_all, enrichedLR_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_secreted, enrichedLR_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ECM, enrichedLR_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ccc, enrichedLR_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_nps, enrichedLR_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_all, enrichedLR_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_secreted, enrichedLR_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ECM, enrichedLR_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ccc, enrichedLR_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_nps, enrichedLR_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_all, enrichedLR_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_secreted, enrichedLR_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ECM, enrichedLR_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ccc, enrichedLR_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_nps)

rm(enriched_pathways_Agca_snLLC_CTL_all, enriched_pathways_Agca_snLLC_CTL_secreted, enriched_pathways_Agca_snLLC_CTL_ECM, enriched_pathways_Agca_snLLC_CTL_ccc, enriched_pathways_Agca_snLLC_CTL_nps, enriched_pathways_Agca_snLLC_LLC_all, enriched_pathways_Agca_snLLC_LLC_secreted, enriched_pathways_Agca_snLLC_LLC_ECM, enriched_pathways_Agca_snLLC_LLC_ccc, enriched_pathways_Agca_snLLC_LLC_nps, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_CTL_all, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_CTL_secreted, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_CTL_ECM, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_CTL_ccc, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_CTL_nps, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_2w_all, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_2w_secreted, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_2w_ECM, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_2w_ccc, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_2w_nps, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_all, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_secreted, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_ECM, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_ccc, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_nps, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_all, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_secreted, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_ECM, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_ccc, enriched_pathways_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_nps, enriched_pathways_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_all, enriched_pathways_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_secreted, enriched_pathways_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_ECM, enriched_pathways_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_ccc, enriched_pathways_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_nps, enriched_pathways_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_all, enriched_pathways_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_secreted, enriched_pathways_Kim_scB16F10_B16F)
```



# THIS IS WHERE integrated_cellchat.Rdata ENDS!


# Load (above) data

```{r, include=FALSE}
load("C:/Users/nwb_l/Documents/r_projects/scIntegration/sc_combined_cellchat.RData")
```



# Enriched pathways

## List of enriched pathways per sample

### I want the option to select for every combination of samples/interaction types. For example, select experiment (Brown_scLLC) then sample (CTL) then interaction type (ECM).

```{r}
cellchat_#sample_#interaction_type@netP[["pathways]]

# List of samples: Agca_snLLC_CTL, Agca_snLLC_LLC, Brown_scLLC_CTL, Brown_scLLC_2w, Brown_scLLC_2.5w, Brown_scLLC_3.5w, Kim_scB16F10_CTL, Kim_scB16F10_B16F10, Pryce_scC26_CTL, Pryce_scC26_C26, Pryce_scKPP_CTL, Pryce_scKPP_KPP, Zhang_snKIC_CTL, Zhang_snKIC_KIC


# List of interaction types: all, secreted, ECM, ccc, nps


cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_all@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_nps@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]

cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_all@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_nps@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]

cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_all@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_nps@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]

cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_all@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_nps@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]

cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_all@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_nps@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]

cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_all@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_nps@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]

cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_all@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_nps@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]

cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_all@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_nps@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]

cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_all@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_nps@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]

cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_all@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_nps@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]

cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_all@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_nps@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]

cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_all@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_nps@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]

cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_all@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_nps@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]

cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_all@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_nps@netP[["pathways"]]
cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]
```
### NOTE - have option to download as a csv file or text file!


## List of enriched ligand-receptor pairs per sample.

### I want the option to select for every combination of samples/interaction types. For example, select experiment (Brown_scLLC) then sample (CTL) then interaction type (ECM).

```{r}
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_#sample_#interaction_type, signaling = c(cellchat_#sample_#interaction_type@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)

# List of samples: Agca_snLLC_CTL, Agca_snLLC_LLC, Brown_scLLC_CTL, Brown_scLLC_2w, Brown_scLLC_2.5w, Brown_scLLC_3.5w, Kim_scB16F10_CTL, Kim_scB16F10_B16F10, Pryce_scC26_CTL, Pryce_scC26_C26, Pryce_scKPP_CTL, Pryce_scKPP_KPP, Zhang_snKIC_CTL, Zhang_snKIC_KIC


# List of interaction types: all, secreted, ECM, ccc, nps

extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_all, signaling = c(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_all@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_secreted, signaling = c(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_ECM, signaling = c(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_nps, signaling = c(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_nps@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_ccc, signaling = c(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_CTL_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)

extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_all, signaling = c(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_all@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_secreted, signaling = c(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_ECM, signaling = c(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_nps, signaling = c(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_nps@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_ccc, signaling = c(cellchat_Agca_snLLC_LLC_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)

extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_all, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_all@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_secreted, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_ECM, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_nps, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_nps@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_ccc, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_CTL_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)

extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_all, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_all@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_secreted, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_ECM, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_nps, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_nps@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_ccc, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2w_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)

extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_all, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_all@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_secreted, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_ECM, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_nps, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_nps@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_ccc, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_2.5w_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)

extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_all, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_all@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_secreted, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_ECM, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_nps, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_nps@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_ccc, signaling = c(cellchat_Brown_scLLC_3.5w_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)

extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_all, signaling = c(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_all@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_secreted, signaling = c(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_ECM, signaling = c(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_nps, signaling = c(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_nps@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_ccc, signaling = c(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_CTL_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)

extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_all, signaling = c(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_all@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_secreted, signaling = c(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_ECM, signaling = c(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_nps, signaling = c(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_nps@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_ccc, signaling = c(cellchat_Kim_scB16F10_B16F10_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)

extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_all, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_all@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_secreted, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_ECM, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_nps, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_nps@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_ccc, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_CTL_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)

extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_all, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_all@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_secreted, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ECM, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_nps, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_nps@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ccc, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scC26_C26_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)

extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_all, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_all@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_secreted, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ECM, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_nps, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_nps@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ccc, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_CTL_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)

extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_all, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_all@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_secreted, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ECM, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_nps, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_nps@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ccc, signaling = c(cellchat_Pryce_scKPP_KPP_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)

extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_all, signaling = c(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_all@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_secreted, signaling = c(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ECM, signaling = c(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_nps, signaling = c(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_nps@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ccc, signaling = c(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_CTL_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)

extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_all, signaling = c(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_all@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_secreted, signaling = c(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_secreted@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ECM, signaling = c(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ECM@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_nps, signaling = c(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_nps@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
extractEnrichedLR(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ccc, signaling = c(cellchat_Zhang_snKIC_KIC_ccc@netP[["pathways"]]), geneLR.return = TRUE)
```
### NOTE - have option to download as a csv file or text file!


## Identify enriched pathways from one cell type (or group of cells) to another

```{r}
### Extract communication probabilities at the pathway level
netP_subset <- subsetCommunication(#cellchat_orig.ident_interaction.type, slot.name = "netP")

### Subset for enriched pathways for target cells to source cells
netP_subset <- netP_subset[
  netP_subset$source %in% c("#source_cell_1", "#source_cell_2", "#etc.") & 
  netP_subset$target %in% c("#target_cell_1", "#target_cell_2", "#etc."), 
]

### Get unique pathways from specified cells to target cells
pathways_subset <- unique(netP_subset$pathway_name)


head(pathways_subset)
```
### NOTE - have option to download as a csv file or text file!


# Visualize

## Specify colours (specify here, if not leave blank and will use default colours)

```{r, include=FALSE}
cluster_colours <- c(
  "Satellite cells" = "",
  "Myoblasts" = "",
  "Myonuclei" = "",
  "Endothelial cells" = "",
  "vSMCs" = "",
  "Pericytes" = "",
  "FAPs" = "",
  "Tenocytes" = "",
  "Platelets" = "",
  "Mast cells" = "",
  "Dendritic cells" = "",
  "Monocytes/macrophages" = "",
  "Neutrophils" = "",
  "B cells" = "",
  "T cells" = "",
  "NK cells" = "",
  "Neural/glial cells" = "",
  "Schwann cells" = ""
)
```


## Heatmap, interaction strength between all cell types

```{r}
netVisual_heatmap(#cellchat_orig.ident_interaction.type, 
  slot.name = "net", 
  measure = "weight", 
  color.heatmap = "Reds", 
  color.use = cluster_colours   # Ignore if not specified
  )
```


## Heatmap, contribution of each cell type to enriched signaling pathways

```{r}
netAnalysis_signalingRole_heatmap(
  #cellchat_orig.ident_interaction.type,
  pattern = "all",          # specify "all", "incoming", "outgoing"
  slot.name = "netP",
  color.heatmap = "Reds",
  color.use = cluster_colours, 
  width = 20,
  height = 20,
  font.size = 3
)
```


## Circle plots

```{r}
netVisual_circle(#cellchat_orig.ident_interaction.type@net$count, 
                 weight.scale = TRUE, 
                 label.edge = TRUE, # Can specify FALSE to remove numbers
                 title.name = "Number of interactions", 
                 arrow.size = 0.05,
                 color.use = cluster_colours, 
                 sources.use = c("#source_cell_1", "#source_cell_2", "#etc."), # Specify cell types SENDING signals or leave blank for all
                 targets.use = c("#target_cell_1", "#target_cell_2", "#etc.")) # Specify cell types RECIEVING signals or leave blank for all
```


## Chord plots

```{r}
par(mfrow = c(1, 1), xpd = TRUE)
par(cex = 0.5)

netVisual_chord_gene(#cellchat_orig.ident_interaction.type, 
  signaling = "#signaling pathway", 
  sources.use = c("#source_cell_1", "#source_cell_2", "#etc."),
  targets.use = c("#target_cell_1", "#target_cell_2", "#etc."), 
  color.use = cluster_colours, 
  show.legend = TRUE)
```
